title: connection.rs: magic 0x0095 for TPM_RC_SIZE
description: In wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs line 38, the literal 0x0095 is compared against the wolfTPM return code to detect a too-small response buffer, with only a comment naming it TPM_RC_SIZE. This should use the named constant from the bindgen output. If the constant ever changes (unlikely but possible for wolfTPM-internal error remapping), this silently stops working and the caller gets a generic transport error instead of ResponseBufferTooSmall.
